title: nf-cavalier parameters
description: Nextflow pipeline for singleton and family based candidate variant reporting based on gene lists.

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

outdir.description: The output directory where the results will be saved.

alignments.description: TSV file with alignment file paths (Col 1: sample ID, Col 2: BAM or CRAM path).

lists.description: Gene lists, comma separated (TSV or ID). Supports local TSV files, PanelApp (PAA:/PAE:), HPO (HP:), Genes4Epilepsy (G4E:), HGNC, or genomic regions.

ped.description: Pedigree file. Required for familial analysis; leave null for singletons.

short_vcf_annotated.description: Pre-annotated short variant VCF (skips annotation step).

struc_vcf_annotated.description: Pre-annotated structural variant VCF (skips annotation step).

annotate_only.description: Only perform annotation; skip filtering and reporting.

ref_fasta.description: Path to GRCh38 reference FASTA file.

cavalier_cache_dir.description: Directory for the cavalier R package cache.

cavalier_options.description: Additional options passed to the cavalier R package.

somalier_dir.description: Path to existing somalier reference data.

vep_options.title: VEP options
vep_options.description: Variant Effect Predictor annotation settings and plugin files.

vep_check.description: Check that the number of variants output by VEP equals the number input.

vep_spliceai_snv.description: SpliceAI SNV VCF path (available from Illumina). Set to null to disable.

vep_spliceai_indel.description: SpliceAI Indel VCF path (available from Illumina). Set to null to disable.

vep_alphamissense.description: AlphaMissense annotation TSV file. Set to null to disable.

vep_revel.description: REVEL annotation TSV file. Set to null to disable.

vep_utr_annotator.description: UTRannotator file. Set to null to disable.

vcfanno_options.title: vcfanno options
vcfanno_options.description: vcfanno annotation settings for short variant population databases.

vcfanno_binary.description: Path or URL for vcfanno binary.

vcfanno_gnomad.description: gnomAD 4.1 callset vcf.gz with INFO: AC, AF, fafmax_faf95_max, nhomalt.

vcfanno_clinvar.description: ClinVar VCF with INFO: CLNSIG, GENEINFO and ID.

short_n_shards.description: Split input VCF into this many shards for parallel processing.

max_short_per_deck.description: Maximum number of short variants per slide deck.

short_vcf_filter.description: Apply FILTER to input short variant VCF (comma-separated FILTER values to retain).

short_info.description: INFO fields to keep from the short variant VCF.

short_format.description: FORMAT fields to keep from the short variant VCF.

short_fill_tags.description: Fill AC, AF, and AN tags using bcftools +fill-tags. Recommended if VCF does not have these set.

short_vcfanno_filter.description: Filter expression applied after vcfanno annotation. Reduces VEP runtime by dropping common variants.

FILTER_SHORT_MIN_DP.description: Minimum read depth for short variants.

FILTER_SHORT_MIN_GQ.description: Minimum genotype quality for short variants.

FILTER_SHORT_POP_DOM_MAX_AF.description: Maximum population (gnomAD) AF for dominant short variants.

FILTER_SHORT_POP_REC_MAX_AF.description: Maximum population (gnomAD) AF for recessive short variants.

FILTER_SHORT_POP_DOM_MAX_AC.description: Maximum population (gnomAD) AC for dominant short variants.

FILTER_SHORT_POP_REC_MAX_AC.description: Maximum population (gnomAD) AC for recessive short variants.

FILTER_SHORT_POP_DOM_MAX_HOM.description: Maximum population (gnomAD) homozygote count for dominant short variants.

FILTER_SHORT_POP_REC_MAX_HOM.description: Maximum population (gnomAD) homozygote count for recessive short variants.

FILTER_SHORT_COH_DOM_MAX_AF.description: Maximum cohort AF for dominant short variants. Set to null to disable.

FILTER_SHORT_COH_REC_MAX_AF.description: Maximum cohort AF for recessive short variants. Set to null to disable.

FILTER_SHORT_COH_DOM_MAX_AC.description: Maximum cohort AC for dominant short variants. Set to null to disable.

FILTER_SHORT_COH_REC_MAX_AC.description: Maximum cohort AC for recessive short variants. Set to null to disable.

FILTER_SHORT_CLINVAR_LIST_ONLY.description: Restrict ClinVar variant reporting to genes in the gene list only.

FILTER_SHORT_CLINVAR_KEEP_PAT.description: Regex pattern for ClinVar significance values to keep.

FILTER_SHORT_CLINVAR_DISC_PAT.description: Regex pattern for ClinVar significance values to discard.

FILTER_SHORT_MISSENSE.description: Enable TYPE='MISSENSE' (VEP CSQ contains 'missense') variant class.

FILTER_SHORT_MIN_CADD_PP.description: Minimum CADD Phred score to force inclusion (ClinGen PP3 supporting threshold).

FILTER_SHORT_MIN_SPLICEAI_PP.description: Minimum SpliceAI score to force inclusion (ClinGen PP3 supporting threshold).

FILTER_SHORT_VEP_MIN_IMPACT.description: Minimum VEP impact to retain as TYPE='OTHER'. One of: MODIFIER, LOW, MODERATE, HIGH.

FILTER_SHORT_VEP_CONSEQUENCES.description: Comma-separated VEP consequences to retain as TYPE='OTHER'. Set to null to disable.

FILTER_SHORT_MAX_PROMOTERAI.description: Maximum PromoterAI score for promoter variants. High precision: -0.5, balanced: -0.2, high recall: -0.1.

struc_variant_options.title: Structural variant options
struc_variant_options.description: Processing options and reference data for structural variants.

struc_vcf_filter.description: Apply FILTER to input structural variant VCF (comma-separated FILTER values to retain).

struc_info.description: INFO fields to keep from the structural variant VCF.

struc_format.description: FORMAT fields to keep from the structural variant VCF.

struc_fill_tags.description: Fill AC, AF, and AN tags for structural variants using bcftools +fill-tags.

struc_n_shards.description: Number of shards for parallel structural variant processing.

max_struc_per_deck.description: Maximum number of structural variants per slide deck.

svafdb.description: SVAFotate database path for gnomAD v4.1 SV population frequencies.

pop_sv.description: gnomAD v4.1 SV sites VCF file.

ref_gene.description: NCBI RefSeq Select TSV file (from UCSC Table Browser).

FILTER_STRUC_POP_DOM_MAX_AF.description: Maximum population (gnomAD) AF for dominant SVs.

FILTER_STRUC_POP_REC_MAX_AF.description: Maximum population (gnomAD) AF for recessive SVs.

FILTER_STRUC_POP_DOM_MAX_HOM.description: Maximum population (gnomAD) homozygote count for dominant SVs. Set to null to disable.

FILTER_STRUC_POP_REC_MAX_HOM.description: Maximum population (gnomAD) homozygote count for recessive SVs. Set to null to disable.

FILTER_STRUC_COH_DOM_MAX_AF.description: Maximum cohort AF for dominant SVs.

FILTER_STRUC_COH_REC_MAX_AF.description: Maximum cohort AF for recessive SVs.

FILTER_STRUC_COH_DOM_MAX_AC.description: Maximum cohort AC for dominant SVs. Set to null to disable.

FILTER_STRUC_COH_REC_MAX_AC.description: Maximum cohort AC for recessive SVs. Set to null to disable.

FILTER_STRUC_SVTYPES.description: Comma-separated list of SV types to retain. Note: BND is currently excluded upstream due to a VEP issue.

FILTER_STRUC_VEP_MIN_IMPACT.description: Minimum VEP impact for SVs. One of: MODIFIER, LOW, MODERATE, HIGH.

FILTER_STRUC_VEP_CONSEQUENCES.description: Comma-separated VEP consequences to retain for SVs.

FILTER_STRUC_LARGE_LENGTH.description: Automatically report SVs larger than this length (bp). Set to null to disable.

SLIDE_INFO_SHORT.description: Fields to include in short variant slides. Must contain a DEFAULT key; additional keys (e.g. MISSENSE, SPLICING, PROMOTER, OTHER) add type-specific columns.

SLIDE_INFO_STRUC.description: Fields to include in structural variant slides. Must contain a DEFAULT key.
